name: jf-skills
description: Twelve JF-specific skills for The Journal of Finance (JF), the American Finance Association flagship (est. 1946, Wiley-Blackwell): the AFA portal and tiered submission fee, the 60-page limit, the bundled Internet Appendix, the Data and Code Sharing Policy, and general-interest positioning across the finance top-3.

plugins.name: jf-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the The Journal of Finance (JF) manuscript lifecycle, with JF-specific mechanics (AFA portal, tiered submission fee, 60-page limit, bundled Internet Appendix, Data and Code Sharing Policy).
